name: Idia Shroud
description:
Waiter!!! More leoide, please!!

This bot COULD develop into angst btw. Just a forewarning.

Okay, but, obviously this bot is the leoide version and is self indulgent for me(and anyone else who decides that they want to rp w/ a leoide bot). But I will be posting a non leoide version as well for everyone else to use that aren't interested in using set pov bots.

Go ahead and check public chats for the starting message if you like! Or, you can go in blind. That works too.

If uve read down this far, congrats! Anyways, pls let me know if theres any spelling errors or mistakes/repetitive stuff with the bot
creator: gloomura1
